rulings.Case Title: ZITA, LLC VS. MITCHELL BOYD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Defendant: 1. To Provide Written Response
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 28, 2018 line 6. PLAINTIFF ZITA, LLC's Motion For An Order Compelling Defendant: 1. To Provide Written Response GRANTED, subject to opposition. Admissions are deemed admitted. Mitchel Boyd shall provide complete verified responses without objections within 5 days of notice of entry of order to Form Interrogatories and Request for Production. Sanctions granted in the amount of $872.50. = (501/REQ)
